data.title: Strategy increased its holdings by 3,459 BTC at an average price of $82,618
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: According to market news: Strategy (formerly MicroStrategy) has increased its holdings of 3,459 BTC from April 7 to April 13, with an average price of US$82,618.

data.title: Michael Saylor: Strategy's BTC return has reached 11.4% so far this year
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Strategy (formerly MicroStrategy) co-founder Michael Saylor posted on the X platform that Strategy has acquired 3,459 BTC at a price of approximately US$285.8 million. The BTC yield has reached 11.4% so far this year. As of April 13, 2025, it holds 531,644 BTC, with an average acquisition price of US$67,556.

data.title: MANTRA investor Shorooq: Neither the fund nor the MANTRA team sold any tokens during the OM crash
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News MANTRA's investor Shorooq Partners posted on the X platform that during the OM price crash, Shorooq Fund, founding partners or MANTRA team did not sell any tokens. MANTRA also does not have any loopholes, and on-chain data confirms that large-scale forced liquidation is the trigger. The chain reaction occurred during a period of low liquidity, leading to panic selling. Shorooq said that as a long-term equity investor in MANTRA, his belief has never wavered, and his mission is to achieve regulated tokenization of real-world assets on the chain.

data.title: Bitfinex report: Bitcoin rebounds strongly, buyers are looking forward to it
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News Bitfinex released a report stating that Bitcoin rebounded strongly in the past week and regained the $85,000 mark. US President Trump announced a 90-day suspension of new tariffs, trade tensions eased, and risk appetite was reignited. The easing of the macroeconomic situation drove the rebound of Bitcoin. Importantly, the rebound was driven by spot market demand rather than leveraged derivatives positions, indicating that buyers hold real confidence in Bitcoin. Bitcoin closed up 6.67% this week, extending a 15% gain since the low, indicating that this pullback is consistent with the mid-cycle pullback trend commonly seen in previous bull markets.
The cumulative spot volume increments on major exchanges show continued active buying, but prices are still trapped in the $75,000 to $85,000 range. This divergence suggests that if supply is further reduced, an upward breakthrough is possible. However, a short-term pullback is expected at the beginning of this week, driven by profit-taking. The reaction to this drop — whether buyers continue to absorb supply — will determine whether Bitcoin pushes toward $90,000.

data.title: The often mentioned reason behind the sell-off of U.S. Treasuries is the closing of “basis trades”
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Felipe Villarroel, portfolio management partner at TwentyFour Asset Management, said in a report that after talking to government bond trading departments, TwentyFour did not find a clear answer to what caused the sell-off in U.S. Treasuries. "The most common reason is the unwinding of 'basis trading,'" he explained, which involves traders having to sell U.S. Treasuries to meet margin calls on leveraged positions. The purpose of leveraged positions is to arbitrage the tiny price differences between U.S. Treasuries and U.S. Treasury futures or interest rate swaps. The huge volume involved triggered a chain reaction, and suddenly many bonds needed a new home, and buyers were too nervous to catch the falling knife in the most turbulent week in recent times. (Jinshi)

data.title: Huobi HTX will launch OM (MANTRA) today at 21:00
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News According to the announcement of Huobi HTX, Huobi HTX has opened the OM deposit service at 19:30 (GMT+8) on April 14. The spot trading of OM/USDT will be opened at 21:00 (GMT+8) on April 14. The withdrawal service of OM will be opened at 21:00 (GMT+8) on April 15.
It is reported that MANTRA is a Cosmos SDK-based L1 blockchain dedicated to filling the compliance gap in the Cosmos ecosystem. The project is positioned as a "blockchain that provides services for tokenized RWAs and regulated digital assets". MANTRA provides a high-performance, scalable blockchain architecture that supports a small number of regulated and compliant applications.

data.title: Trump’s WLFI Expands Holdings With $775K SEI Token Investment
data.description:
TL;DR World Liberty Financial (WLFI), the crypto initiative backed by the Trump family, has invested $775,000 in SEI tokens, further expanding its growing altcoin portfolio. Despite current losses across its crypto holdings, WLFI remains focused on diversification. This move comes amid a shifting political and financial climate that is becoming increasingly supportive of digital assets.
source: https://crypto-economy.com/trumps-wlfi-expands-holdings-with-775k-sei-token-investment/

data.title: Vitalik: Privacy is the core of maintaining social order and promoting technological progress
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Vitalik Buterin emphasized in his latest blog post that privacy is a core element in maintaining social order and promoting technological progress. He pointed out that artificial intelligence is greatly improving the ability of centralized data collection and analysis, while also expanding the scope of voluntary data sharing. The risk of information leakage is increasing, and cryptographic technologies such as ZK-SNARK and FHE provide possibilities for "selective disclosure" and "verifiable privacy protection." Privacy is not about being separated from society, but about allowing everyone to live freely and explore innovation without being overly monitored and judged. He called on the Web3 community to actively promote the popularization and standardization of privacy tools to cope with the increasingly centralized information control trend.

data.title: JPMorgan Chase launches pound-denominated blockchain deposit account to support pound on-chain payments
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News JPMorgan Chase's blockchain division Kinexys (formerly Onyx) has launched a blockchain deposit account denominated in pound sterling in the UK, marking an important expansion of its real-time settlement infrastructure following the early launch of euro and dollar products. Currently, JPMorgan Chase has allowed companies to make round-the-clock on-chain payments in British pounds (GBP), adding to its euro (EUR) and US dollar (USD) options. It is reported that large companies such as SwapAgent and Trafigura of the London Stock Exchange have taken the lead in using JPMorgan Chase's newly launched pound blockchain account. (The Block)
